subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Nov. 1911 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: All true art is a gift of the Holy Spirit... It is the Sun of Truth, O artist... The Sun of Truth is everywhere. It is shining on the whole world.
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @light and darkness, @Manifestation of God as sun, @The Holy Spirit, @high station of the arts and sciences
